name: Tiff Ebrum
description: Tiff is the deuteragonist in the anime "Kirby: Right Back at Ya!". She is the daughter of Sir Ebrum and Lady Like and the older sister of Tuff who lives in King Dedede's castle. Besides Meta Knight, Tiff is known to be the most intelligent inhabitant of Dreamland and she is the only one who can call upon the Warp Star when needed because she is the one who cares about Kirby the most.
creator: MutantStar
